display_text: Ofrenda - Beloved Memory, Tier N/A (Non-Purchasable): An Offering that can be placed on an Altar to honor the dead. Its sole ability honors the dead with a memory, targeted on friendly buildings. Provides no stat bonuses. This item is for event or tribute mechanics. Stats: CD: 3s, Cast Speed: 1000.
